message:
fix(web): resolve CSS keyframe naming conflict for skeleton animations

Renames skeleton-shimmer keyframe in mobile-ux.css to avoid conflict
with the same-named keyframe defined in components.css. The duplicate
definition was causing unpredictable animation behavior depending on
CSS load order.

Changes:
- Rename skeleton-shimmer to skeleton-translate-shimmer in mobile-ux.css
- Update animation references to use the new name
- Remove duplicate skeleton-pulse keyframe (defined in components.css)
- Add comment explaining keyframe relationship with components.css

The components.css keyframes use a gradient/opacity approach while
mobile-ux.css uses a transform-based approach. Both are valid but
need distinct names to coexist.
